cheatSheet:
# Design Patterns
## SOLID, Creational, Structural, Behavioral, Anti-patterns

sessions.title: SOLID Principles
sessions.content:
## SOLID Principles

Detailed lesson content for SOLID Principles. Includes code examples in Python and TypeScript, UML diagrams, real-world use cases, and interview Q&A.

### Key Concepts
- Understand when and why to use this pattern
- Know the trade-offs and alternatives
- Be ready to implement from scratch in an interview
- Know real-world examples from production systems

quizBank.question: What does SOLID stand for?
quizBank.explanation: Single Responsibility, Open/Closed, Liskov Substitution, Interface Segregation, Dependency Inversion
